name: ChessCoach
postCreateCommand: pip install -r llm/requirements.txt -r llm/requirements-ci.txt && sudo apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends stockfish
//: COACH_DEEPSEEK_API_KEY is intentionally not pre-set in remoteEnv — devcontainer users must export it via `export COACH_DEEPSEEK_API_KEY=...` in their shell or set it in `.env`. Without it, /chat falls back to deterministic templates and the api still serves.
